mapper.sql: id, model_code, connection_id, model_name, model_kind, expected_dimensions, supports_dimension_override, temperature, max_tokens, timeout_seconds, input_price_per_1k_tokens, output_price_per_1k_tokens, extra_options_json::text as extra_options_json, enabled, remarks, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: insert into llm_model_profiles ( model_code, connection_id, model_name, model_kind, expected_dimensions, supports_dimension_override, temperature, max_tokens, timeout_seconds, input_price_per_1k_tokens, output_price_per_1k_tokens, extra_options_json, enabled, remarks, created_by, updated_by ) values ( #{modelProfile.modelCode}, #{modelProfile.connectionId}, #{modelProfile.modelName}, #{modelProfile.modelKind}, #{modelProfile.expectedDimensions}, #{modelProfile.supportsDimensionOverride}, #{modelProfile.temperature}, #{modelProfile.maxTokens}, #{modelProfile.timeoutSeconds}, #{modelProfile.inputPricePer1kTokens}, #{modelProfile.outputPricePer1kTokens}, #{modelProfile.extraOptionsJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, #{modelProfile.enabled}, #{modelProfile.remarks}, #{modelProfile.createdBy}, #{modelProfile.updatedBy} ) returning id
mapper.update: update llm_model_profiles set model_code = #{modelProfile.modelCode}, connection_id = #{modelProfile.connectionId}, model_name = #{modelProfile.modelName}, model_kind = #{modelProfile.modelKind}, expected_dimensions = #{modelProfile.expectedDimensions}, supports_dimension_override = #{modelProfile.supportsDimensionOverride}, temperature = #{modelProfile.temperature}, max_tokens = #{modelProfile.maxTokens}, timeout_seconds = #{modelProfile.timeoutSeconds}, input_price_per_1k_tokens = #{modelProfile.inputPricePer1kTokens}, output_price_per_1k_tokens = #{modelProfile.outputPricePer1kTokens}, extra_options_json = #{modelProfile.extraOptionsJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, enabled = #{modelProfile.enabled}, remarks = #{modelProfile.remarks}, updated_by = #{modelProfile.updatedBy}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{modelProfile.id}
mapper.select: select from llm_model_profiles order by id desc
select from llm_model_profiles where id = #{id} and enabled = true
